offer: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate weekly sales pipeline reports instead of manual spreadsheet tracking.
problem: Manual reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to Shopify sellers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for sellers
try_it: Let users try customizable report templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
